query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure wearing a flowing blue garment appears in motion against a background of lush green foliage. The shape suggests a person with raised arms or extended fabric, captured in an outdoor garden or natural environment with abundant greenery.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure in a flowing blue garment dissolves into sweeping motion blur and streaked color against green foliage, with form and detail deliberately obliterated into soft, unresolving smears that render the subject almost abstract. The image abandons clear representation in favor of pure color, gesture, and movement, leaving only the impression of fabric and figure dissolving into their surroundings.
